reapack.name: reaper_hidden-vkb.ext
reapack.desc: HPRSSN Hidden VKB — REAPER/Ableton Layout, Exclusive Arm & Solo, etc

version.author: HYPRESSION
version.changelog: Hidden virtual MIDI keyboard — like VKB, but without the window REAPER and Ableton keyboard layouts Octave/velocity overlay Exclusive Arm and Exclusive Solo

version.author: HYPRESSION
version.changelog: Added "Block single-key shortcuts outside of VKB layout" action to prevent unintended shortcuts while playing Fixed text input not working in Media Explorer and Add FX search fields on Linux Fixed exclusive-arm incorrectly triggering on auto-recarm tracks Fixed auto-recarm flag being lost when ExclusiveArm disarms tracks

version.author: HYPRESSION
version.changelog: - Improved macOS key handling — no longer requires Accessibility permission - Fixed keyboard layout independence — keys now map by physical position, works correctly on AZERTY, QWERTZ, etc. - Improved macOS and Linux backward compatibility — macOS 10.15+ (Catalina), Linux Ubuntu 22.04+
